allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d['success'], '| data:', d['data']\)")

PowerShell(taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd m:\\Projets\\Mario\\shop-react\\backend; $env:NODE_ENV="development"; node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); require\('express-async-errors'\); const app = require\('./src/app'\); app.listen\(4001, \(\) => console.log\('OK'\)\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 2000\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(cd m:\\Projets\\Mario\\shop-react\\backend; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $h = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/health"; $o = try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/orders" -Method Get } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; $w = try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/wallet" -Method Get } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; Write-Output "health=$\($h.data.status\) orders=$o wallet=$w"; $proc.Kill\(\))
